message:
Simplify npm trusted publishing workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,48 +1,26 @@
-name: Publish Pi package to npm
+name: Publish Pi Package
 
 on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main]
-    paths:
-      - "packages/pi-tenzir-ship/package.json"
+  release:
+    types: [published]
   workflow_dispatch:
 
 permissions:
+  id-token: write # Required for OIDC
   contents: read
-  id-token: write
 
 jobs:
   publish:
-    name: Publish pi-tenzir-ship
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     defaults:
       run:
         working-directory: packages/pi-tenzir-ship
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: "20"
-          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org
-
-      - name: Publish to npm
-        run: |
-          set +e
-          OUTPUT=$(npm publish --provenance --access public 2>&1)
-          STATUS=$?
-          set -e
-
-          echo "$OUTPUT"
-
-          if [ $STATUS -eq 0 ]; then
-            exit 0
-          fi
-
-          if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -Eqi "EPUBLISHCONFLICT|cannot publish over the previously published versions"; then
-            echo "Version already published; treating as no-op."
-            exit 0
-          fi
+          node-version: "24"
+          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
 
-          exit $STATUS
+      - run: npm publish
